zh.Bispham, Lancashire, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾比斯法姆
zh.Bispham by Ormskirk, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾比斯法姆 白 奧姆斯吉可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Dalton III於1230年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾比斯法姆時，他的父親Sir Richard Dalton II29歲，母親Lady Mary Latymer30歲。他於1260年與Mary de Lawrence在英國藍卡爾比斯法姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1293年在英國藍卡爾道爾頓享年63歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾道爾頓。

zh-hans.Bispham, Lancashire, England: 英国英格兰藍卡爾比斯法姆
zh-hans.Bispham by Ormskirk, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾比斯法姆 白 奧姆斯吉可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Dalton III于1230年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾比斯法姆时，他的父亲Sir Richard Dalton II29岁，母亲Lady Mary Latymer30岁。他于1260年与Mary de Lawrence在英国藍卡爾比斯法姆结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他去世于1293年在英国藍卡爾道爾頓享年63岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾道爾頓。

nameMeanings.name: Dalton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Dalton in Westmorland, Durham, Lancashire, Northumberland, and Yorkshire, from Old English dæl ‘valley’ (see Dale ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.
History: The surname was taken to Ireland by English traders in the early 13th century .

variants.name: Daughton
meanings: English (Lincolnshire) and Irish (Kilkenny and Tipperary): variant of   Dalton  .

variants.name: Dale
meanings: English: from Middle English dal, dale, daile ‘dale, valley’ (Old English dæl, reinforced in northern England by the cognate Old Norse dalr), a topographic name for someone who lived in a valley, or a habitational name from any of numerous minor places called with this word, such as Dale in Cumbria and Yorkshire.
Norwegian: habitational name from a common farm named from Old Norse dali, the dative case of dalr ‘valley’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Dalton III was born in 1230, in Bispham, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Richard Dalton II, was 29 and his mother, Lady Mary Latymer, was 30. He married Mary de Lawrence in 1260, in Bispham, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died in 1293, in Dalton, Lancashire, England, at the age of 63, and was buried in Dalton, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Dalton III est né en 1230, à Bispham, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Richard Dalton II, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Lady Mary Latymer, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Mary de Lawrence en 1260, à Bispham, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé en 1293, à Dalton, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Dalton, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard Dalton III 1230 in Bispham, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Dalton II 29 und seine Mutter Lady Mary Latymer 30. Er hat 1260 in Bispham, Lancashire, England Mary de Lawrence geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb 1293 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Dalton, Lancashire, England und wurde in Dalton, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Dalton III è nato il nel 1230 nel Bispham, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Richard Dalton II, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Lady Mary Latymer, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Mary de Lawrence nel 1260, nel Bispham, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì nel 1293, nel Dalton, Lancashire, England, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Dalton, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Dalton IIIが1230年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアビスファムで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Dalton IIは29歳，母Lady Mary Latymerは30歳であった。1260年にイギリスランカシュアイアビスファムでMary de Lawrenceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1293年にイギリスランカシュアイアダルトンで63歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアダルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Dalton III(이)가 1230년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 비스프아에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Dalton II(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Mary Latymer(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1260년 영국 랭카실르 비스프아에서 Mary de Lawrence(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1293년 영국 랭카실르 돌턴에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 돌턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Dalton III nasceu em 1230, em Bispham, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Richard Dalton II, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Lady Mary Latymer, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary de Lawrence em 1260, em Bispham, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1293, em Dalton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Dalton, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Dalton III родился в 1230 г. в местности бисфам, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Dalton II было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Mary Latymer, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary de Lawrence в 1260 г. в местности бисфам, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер в 1293 г. в местности далтон, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности далтон, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Richard Dalton III nació en 1230, en Bispham, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Richard Dalton II, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Lady Mary Latymer, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Mary de Lawrence en 1260, en Bispham, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió en 1293, en Dalton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Dalton, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
